## What this changes

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated in this PR (`docs/API.md`, `docs/PLAN.md`,
      `docs/TECH_STACK.md`) if this changes behavior, endpoints, phase
      status, or dependencies
- [ ] Backend: `ruff check .`, `black --check .`, and `pytest` pass locally
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass locally (if
      `frontend/` changed)
- [ ] New dependencies have an open-source license compatible with this
      project (see [docs/TECH_STACK.md](../docs/TECH_STACK.md))
- [ ] No proprietary/paid vision APIs introduced
